zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Hyde於1525年出生在英國爾諾波利時，她的父親Hamnet Hyde34歲，母親Margaret Isabel Warren33歲。她於大約1548年與Straingewaies在英國英格蘭爾諾波利結婚。她去世於1589年5月7日在英國奧可福爾布盧享年64歲，埋葬在英國波克夏塞頓 庫尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Hyde于1525年出生在英国爾諾波利时，她的父亲Hamnet Hyde34岁，母亲Margaret Isabel Warren33岁。她于大约1548年与Straingewaies在英国英格兰爾諾波利结婚。她去世于1589年5月7日在英国奧可福爾布盧享年64岁，埋葬在英国波克夏塞頓 庫尼。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Hyde was born in 1525, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, her father, Hamnet Hyde, was 34 and her mother, Margaret Isabel Warren, was 33. She married Straingewaies about 1548, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 7 May 1589, in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Hyde est née en 1525, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamnet Hyde, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Isabel Warren, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Straingewaies environ 1548, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1589, à Bruern, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Hyde 1525 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamnet Hyde 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret Isabel Warren 33. Sie hat um 1548 in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Straingewaies geheiratet. Sie starb am 7. Mai 1589 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Hyde è nata il nel 1525 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hamnet Hyde, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret Isabel Warren, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Straingewaies circa 1548, nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 7 maggio 1589, nel Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Hydeが1525年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Hamnet Hydeは34歳，母Margaret Isabel Warrenは33歳であった。約1548年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーでStraingewaiesと結婚した。彼女は1589年5月7日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブルエルンで64歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアスットオン コウルテナイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Hyde(이)가 1525년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamnet Hyde(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Isabel Warren(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 Straingewaies(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1589년 5월 7일 영국 스퍼드실르 브루른에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 수턴 쿠르텐아이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Hyde nasceu em 1525, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamnet Hyde, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Isabel Warren, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Straingewaies aproximadamente 1548, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 7 de maio de 1589, em Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Hyde родилась в 1525 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hamnet Hyde было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Isabel Warren, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Straingewaies около 1548 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 7 мая 1589 г. в местности бруирн, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности суттон коуртенеи, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Hyde nació en 1525, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamnet Hyde, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Isabel Warren, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Straingewaies aproximadamente 1548, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1589, en Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
